data.name: Ancestor Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, you gain 1 life for each attacking creature.
data.flavor_text: From emperors to paupers, every citizen of Shenmeng pays reverence to the mighty ancestor dragons.

data.name: Apothecary Stomper
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
• You gain 4 life.
data.flavor_text: A walking clinic with a trumpet to sound its arrival.

data.name: Arbiter of Woe
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Flying
When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card and loses 2 life. You draw a card and gain 2 life.

data.name: Archway Angel
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 2 life for each Gate you control.
data.flavor_text: A ray of hope breaks through the shroud of rain.

data.name: Authority of the Consuls
data.oracle_text:
Creatures your opponents control enter tapped.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls enters, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: Citizens are free to do as they wish, within the confines of the Consulate's laws.

data.name: Ayli, Eternal Pilgrim
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
{1}, Sacrifice another creature: You gain life equal to the sacrificed creature's toughness.
{1}{W}{B}, Sacrifice another creature: Exile target nonland permanent. Activate only if you have at least 10 life more than your starting life total.

data.name: Bake into a Pie
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
data.flavor_text: "My secret ingredient? Well, I can't tell you that. But here's a hint. It's not love."

data.name: Basilisk Collar
data.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage it deals to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

data.name: Bishop's Soldier
data.oracle_text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
data.flavor_text: Vampires, the noble class of old Torrezon, are guided by their dual loyalties to church and crown.

data.name: Bloodfell Caves
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

data.name: Bloodthirsty Conqueror
data.oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch
Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life. (Damage causes loss of life.)
data.flavor_text: "This town swims with such exquisite blood. I will take every drop for my own."

data.name: Blossoming Sands
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.

data.name: Cat Collector
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
Whenever you gain life for the first time during each of your turns, create a 1/1 white Cat creature token.
data.flavor_text: "Why so many? Because they need a home, just like I once did."

data.name: Charming Prince
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Scry 2.
• You gain 3 life.
• Exile another target creature you own. Return it to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next end step.

data.name: Cloudblazer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 2 life and draw two cards.
data.flavor_text: All the aether charts in the world can't compete with the trained eye of a talented scout.

data.name: Crossway Troublemakers
data.oracle_text:
Attacking Vampires you control have deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage they deal to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by those creatures also causes their controller to gain that much life.)
Whenever a Vampire you control dies, you may pay 2 life. If you do, draw a card.

data.name: Dazzling Angel
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: Her wings ripple with impossible colors—a sign that a miracle is on the way.

data.name: Deadly Riposte
data.oracle_text: Deadly Riposte deals 3 damage to target tapped creature and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"Automatons are fast, precise, and tireless, but they all share one weakness: predictability. Learn their patterns. Strike when they're vulnerable."
—Horance, Urzan general

data.name: Demonic Pact
data.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one that hasn't been chosen —
• This enchantment deals 4 damage to any target and you gain 4 life.
• Target opponent discards two cards.
• Draw two cards.
• You lose the game.

data.name: Diamond Mare
data.oracle_text:
As this creature enters, choose a color.
Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen color, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: When it passes, rainbows follow.

data.name: Dismal Backwater
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {U} or {B}.

data.name: Drogskol Reaver
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
Whenever you gain life, draw a card.

data.name: Dwynen, Gilt-Leaf Daen
data.oracle_text:
Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Other Elf creatures you control get +1/+1.
Whenever Dwynen attacks, you gain 1 life for each attacking Elf you control.

data.name: Eager Trufflesnout
data.oracle_text:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

data.name: Elenda, Saint of Dusk
data.oracle_text:
Lifelink, hexproof from instants
As long as your life total is greater than your starting life total, Elenda gets +1/+1 and has menace. Elenda gets an additional +5/+5 as long as your life total is at least 10 greater than your starting life total.
data.flavor_text: "You have learned nothing in my absence."

data.name: Exsanguinate
data.oracle_text: Each opponent loses X life. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.
data.flavor_text: "I didn't say I would help you find your way home. I said I would help you finish your adventure."

data.name: Felidar Savior
data.oracle_text:
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two other target creatures you control.
data.flavor_text: Cut and bruised from his climb to the summit, Zahr wept with relief when he saw the felidar's horns appear.

data.name: Fumigate
data.oracle_text: Destroy all creatures. You gain 1 life for each creature destroyed this way.
data.flavor_text:
"Ghirapur's gremlin population poses a threat to the infrastructure of the fairgrounds. Threats must be eliminated."
—Sram, senior edificer

data.name: Guarded Heir
data.oracle_text:
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, create two 3/3 white Knight creature tokens.
data.flavor_text: The fate of the kingdom is tied to her own. Until she's old enough to rule, her vassals will not leave her side.

data.name: Healer's Hawk
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
data.flavor_text: The wounded see the glow of its vials long before they see its wings diving out of the clouds.

data.name: Herald of Faith
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: The clerics prayed for salvation. The soldiers prayed for victory. Both prayers were answered.

data.name: Hinterland Sanctifier
data.oracle_text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "You can learn a lot about a place just by asking the land how it's doing."

data.name: Inspiring Overseer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The angels were determined to show a city run by demons that there was a better path.

data.name: Joust Through
data.oracle_text: Joust Through deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "Allow me to offer a counterpoint."

data.name: Jungle Hollow
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

data.name: Kalastria Highborn
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another Vampire you control dies, you may pay {B}. If you do, target player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: Each of Malakir's great families boasts a contingent of nulls appropriate to its rank in society.

data.name: Lathril, Blade of the Elves
data.oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Lathril deals combat damage to a player, create that many 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature tokens.
{T}, Tap ten untapped Elves you control: Each opponent loses 10 life and you gain 10 life.

data.name: Leonin Vanguard
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control three or more creatures, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: The best fighters are skilled in both harming and healing.

data.name: Linden, the Steadfast Queen
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
Whenever a white creature you control attacks, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "Until my last breath, I will defend the realm."

data.name: Lyra Dawnbringer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
Other Angels you control get +1/+1 and have lifelink.

data.name: Mazemind Tome
data.oracle_text:
{T}, Put a page counter on this artifact: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
{2}, {T}, Put a page counter on this artifact: Draw a card.
When there are four or more page counters on this artifact, exile it. If you do, you gain 4 life.

data.name: Midnight Snack
data.oracle_text:
Raid — At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked this turn, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
{2}{B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Target opponent loses X life, where X is the amount of life you gained this turn.

data.name: Moment of Craving
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. You gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: The vampires of the Dusk Legion undertake Blood Fasts to strengthen their wills, but not all can control their hunger.

data.name: Moment of Triumph
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. You gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: "The time of salvation is at hand. Dusk washes over the world, and the Legion will rise immortal!"

data.name: Nullpriest of Oblivion
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {3}{B} (You may pay an additional {3}{B} as you cast this spell.)
Lifelink
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Pelakka Wurm
data.oracle_text:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
When this creature enters, you gain 7 life.
When this creature dies, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: It eats what it wants to eat—which is anything that moves.

data.name: Prayer of Binding
data.oracle_text:
Flash
When this enchantment enters, exile up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. You gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"We do not make martyrs of villains. We leave them and their vile ideologies to be forgotten."
—Lyra Dawnbringer

data.name: Primeval Bounty
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast a creature spell, create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 3 life.

data.name: Regal Caracal
data.oracle_text:
Other Cats you control get +1/+1 and have lifelink. (Damage dealt by those creatures also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Cat creature tokens with lifelink.
data.flavor_text: Oketra's closest viziers are known as her chosen, though others may have a better claim to that moniker.

data.name: Rugged Highlands
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

data.name: Sanguine Syphoner
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: As life returned to the bogs of Bala Ged, the vampires returned to feed upon it.

data.name: Scavenging Ooze
data.oracle_text: {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: In nature, not a single bone or scrap of flesh goes to waste.

data.name: Scoured Barrens
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

data.name: Sire of Seven Deaths
data.oracle_text:
First strike, vigilance
Menace, trample
Reach, lifelink
Ward—Pay 7 life.
data.flavor_text: Born of the infinite void between realities, the Eldrazi have one goal: to consume.

data.name: Soul-Shackled Zombie
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, exile up to two target cards from a single graveyard. If at least one creature card was exiled this way, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: The ritual successfully rebound her soul to her body, but not quite in the way she'd planned.

data.name: Sun-Blessed Healer
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {1}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W} as you cast this spell.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Swiftwater Cliffs
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

data.name: Tatyova, Benthic Druid
data.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "Yavimaya is one being—one vastness of rippling leaves, one deepness of roots, and one chatter of animals—of which I am one part."

data.name: Thornwood Falls
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

data.name: Tranquil Cove
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.

data.name: Tribute to Hunger
data.oracle_text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice. You gain life equal to that creature's toughness.
data.flavor_text:
"Secluded park. Dual puncture wounds. I told you these aren't random murders. Get the stakes ready."
—Rem Karolus, monster slayer

data.name: Unflinching Courage
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample and lifelink. (Damage dealt by the creature also causes its controller to gain that much life.)
data.flavor_text: As Trostani's influence grew, vitality spread through the Conclave—much to the other guilds' dismay.

data.name: Vampire Neonate
data.oracle_text: {2}, {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: One day, they may be paragons of deadly elegance. For the moment, they possess nothing but thirst.

data.name: Vampire Nighthawk
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

data.name: Vampire Spawn
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: Unsuccessful vampire hunters often wind up as ravenous spawn.

data.name: Vampiric Rites
data.oracle_text: {1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain 1 life and draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Scions of the Markov line take particular pleasure in the perversion of humans' holy rituals.

data.name: Vengeful Bloodwitch
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "You thought I was unarmed? Poor fool—your veins are my arsenal."

data.name: Wardens of the Cycle
data.oracle_text:
Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, choose one —
• You gain 2 life.
• You draw a card and you lose 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "The wheel turns, and what meets its end begins again."

This land enters tapped.
